title: This AI-piloted fighter jet takes off with no runway. It just cleared a key test.
summary: The firm calls this the first fully integrated test of the system since the 1990s. “X-BAT is designed to take off and land vertically from anywhere, no airbase, no runway,” said Armor Harris, a senior vice president at Shield AI.
